name: General Requirements
description: General principles for sustainability reporting, including materiality assessment, value chain reporting, and preparation basis under CSRD.

disclosure_requirements.title: Basis of Preparation
disclosure_requirements.description: General basis for preparing sustainability statements in accordance with ESRS.

disclosure_requirements.title: Materiality Assessment
disclosure_requirements.description: Process for determining material impacts, risks, and opportunities (double materiality).

disclosure_requirements.title: Value Chain
disclosure_requirements.description: Scope and boundaries of value chain reporting.

name: General Disclosures
description: Mandatory disclosures applicable to all companies under CSRD, including strategy, governance, and materiality analysis.

disclosure_requirements.title: Strategy and Business Model
disclosure_requirements.description: Description of strategy, business model and value chain in relation to sustainability matters.

disclosure_requirements.title: Stakeholder Engagement
disclosure_requirements.description: Interests and views of stakeholders and how they are taken into account.

disclosure_requirements.title: Material IROs
disclosure_requirements.description: Process to identify and assess material impacts, risks and opportunities.

name: Climate Change
description: Climate-related disclosures including GHG emissions (Scope 1, 2, 3), climate transition plans aligned with 1.5°C pathway, and physical/transition risk management.

disclosure_requirements.title: Climate Transition Plan
disclosure_requirements.description: Company's plan for transitioning to a sustainable economy and limiting global warming to 1.5°C.

disclosure_requirements.title: GHG Emissions
disclosure_requirements.description: Scope 1, 2, and 3 greenhouse gas emissions in tCO2e.

disclosure_requirements.title: Climate Risk Assessment
disclosure_requirements.description: Physical and transition risks from climate change.

name: Pollution
description: Disclosures on air, water, and soil pollution, including substances of concern and microplastics.

disclosure_requirements.title: Pollution Prevention
disclosure_requirements.description: Policies and actions to prevent and control pollution.

disclosure_requirements.title: Pollution Metrics
disclosure_requirements.description: Measurement of emissions to air, water, and soil.

name: Water and Marine Resources
description: Disclosures on water consumption, water withdrawals, and impacts on marine ecosystems.

disclosure_requirements.title: Water Management
disclosure_requirements.description: Policies and actions related to water resources.

disclosure_requirements.title: Water Metrics
disclosure_requirements.description: Water consumption, withdrawal, and discharge metrics.

name: Biodiversity and Ecosystems
description: Disclosures on impacts on biodiversity and ecosystems, including land use change and deforestation.

disclosure_requirements.title: Biodiversity Strategy
disclosure_requirements.description: Transition plan and policies for biodiversity protection.

disclosure_requirements.title: Biodiversity Metrics
disclosure_requirements.description: Metrics related to biodiversity and ecosystem impact.

name: Resource Use and Circular Economy
description: Disclosures on resource use, waste management, and circular economy practices.

disclosure_requirements.title: Circular Economy
disclosure_requirements.description: Policies and actions for transitioning to circular economy.

disclosure_requirements.title: Resource Flows
disclosure_requirements.description: Resource inflows, outflows, and waste metrics.

name: Own Workforce
description: Disclosures on the company's own workforce including working conditions, diversity, and health & safety.

disclosure_requirements.title: Workforce Characteristics
disclosure_requirements.description: Characteristics of the company's own employees and non-employees.

disclosure_requirements.title: Working Conditions
disclosure_requirements.description: Working time, health and safety, remuneration, and social dialogue.

disclosure_requirements.title: Diversity and Inclusion
disclosure_requirements.description: Diversity metrics and equal opportunity policies.

name: Workers in the Value Chain
description: Disclosures on workers in the upstream and downstream value chain.

disclosure_requirements.title: Value Chain Workforce
disclosure_requirements.description: Assessment of working conditions in the value chain.

disclosure_requirements.title: Value Chain Engagement
disclosure_requirements.description: Processes for engaging with value chain workers.

name: Affected Communities
description: Disclosures on impacts on communities affected by company operations.

disclosure_requirements.title: Community Impacts
disclosure_requirements.description: Economic, social and cultural impacts on communities.

disclosure_requirements.title: Indigenous Rights
disclosure_requirements.description: Respect for the rights of indigenous peoples.

name: Consumers and End-Users
description: Disclosures on impacts on consumers and end-users of the company's products and services.

disclosure_requirements.title: Consumer Protection
disclosure_requirements.description: Policies and actions for consumer health, safety, and privacy.

disclosure_requirements.title: Consumer Engagement
disclosure_requirements.description: Processes for engaging with consumers and end-users.

name: Business Conduct
description: Disclosures on business ethics, anti-corruption, supplier relationships, and political engagement.

disclosure_requirements.title: Ethics and Anti-Corruption
disclosure_requirements.description: Policies against corruption and bribery.

disclosure_requirements.title: Supplier Relations
disclosure_requirements.description: Payment practices and supplier relationship management.

disclosure_requirements.title: Political Engagement
disclosure_requirements.description: Lobbying activities and political contributions.
